ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "first_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the game */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "platform_ids" TEXT /* IDs of the platforms the game is available on */,
  "age_rating" TEXT /* Age rating of the game */,
  "esrb_description" TEXT /* Description of the ESRB rating */,
  "metacritic_score" INTEGER /* Metacritic score for the game */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the game's trailer */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the game's cover image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the game's information */,
  "is_multilingual" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game supports multiple languages */,
  "is_multiplayer" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game supports multiplayer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_platform_ids FOREIGN KEY ("platform_ids") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the genre was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the platform was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the platform */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the platform is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "critic_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being reviewed */,
  "critic_rating_value" REAL /* Average rating given by critics */,
  "critic_rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of critic reviews */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the critic review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_critic_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "user_rating_value" REAL /* Average rating given by users */,
  "user_rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of user reviews */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the user review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was published */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., gamer, reviewer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user's email is verified */,
  "is_banned" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is banned */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being followed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user following the game */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date the user started following the game */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the follow status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_followers_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_hype" (
  "hype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hype count */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being tracked */,
  "hype_count" INTEGER /* Hype count for the game */,
  "hype_date" TEXT /* Date the hype was recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the hype count */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_hype_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
